os_loop.title: Brokie OS runs the storefront behind the scenes.
os_loop.body: Products, policies, featured drops, and launch timing all flow from the same feed, so the merch page stays current without manual edits in Shopify.

activity.title: What Brokie OS handled last.
activity.body: The storefront stays aligned because the feed follows the latest automation, launch, and merchandising activity.
activity.empty_body: Once Brokie OS runs a sync or approval, it appears here.
